title: KnowledgeGraphNats
description: NATS subjects for the knowledge-graph builder service: entity/relation build requests, graph mutation updates, query/analysis results, and downstream Spark/Airflow graph-analytics pipeline triggers.

$dd:nats.summary: Entity/relation ingestion, knowledge-graph construction, neighbor/path queries, centrality analysis, and big-data graph-analytics pipeline handoff subjects.

subjects.name: KnowledgeGraphBuildRequests
subjects.description: Inbound knowledge-graph build requests accepted over NATS. Payloads mirror the HTTP /graph/upsert and /graph/extract contracts.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.knowledge_graph.build.requests

subjects.name: KnowledgeGraphUpdates
subjects.description: Graph mutation events emitted after nodes and edges are upserted or extracted into the graph store. Consumers should treat this as an incremental change feed.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.knowledge_graph.updates

subjects.name: KnowledgeGraphResults
subjects.description: Query, path, and centrality/analysis results from knowledge-graph runs.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.knowledge_graph.results

subjects.name: KnowledgeGraphPipelineJobs
subjects.description: Spark/Airflow graph-analytics pipeline job intents (PageRank, community detection, embeddings) generated from the constructed knowledge graph.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.knowledge_graph.pipeline.jobs

queueGroups.name: KnowledgeGraphWorkersQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-knowledge-graph-builder replicas so each queued build request is processed once.
